negative-numbers.name: Negative Numbers
negative-numbers.content:
What are negative numbers?

Negative numbers are any number below 0. At first, this idea might seem confusing, but they actually are really simple numbers.

Imagine you are facing forward. If you take 3 steps, now you are 3 steps ahead of your original position. Now if you take two steps back, you are now at position 1.

3 - 2 = 1

So
